overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a cyberpunk-style underground market at night. The player moves through a neon-lit corridor with red paper lanterns, approaches a food vendor with a distinctive neon-framed service window, examines the counter with a maneki-neko figure and food grill, then continues past the stall. The environment features industrial concrete architecture and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market corridor, passing food displays on the left

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging in a row overhead
food service counter with illuminated displays and menu items
hanging digital display showing menu items and prices
concrete staircase with red neon strip lighting along the edges
exposed industrial metal beams supporting the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow covered market corridor at night. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while food display counters line the left side. The environment features industrial metal support beams and concrete flooring, with digital menu screens visible above the counters.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching vendor stall with neon service window

events.description: turns right toward the vendor stall area with prominent neon lighting
slows down while approaching the neon-framed service counter

agents.ego_description: turning toward and approaching the neon-lit vendor stall, slowing down to examine the area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the neon-framed service window, visible through the glowing frame

entered.detail: rectangular neon light frame in yellow and pink outlining the service window
food preparation counter with various items and cooking equipment
large white ceramic lucky cat figure with red collar on the counter
flat-top grill with skewers and food items being prepared

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward a vendor stall marked by a distinctive rectangular neon frame glowing in yellow and pink. As the player approaches, a vendor NPC becomes visible behind the counter, along with a prominent maneki-neko figure and food grill. The red lanterns from the previous corridor fade from view as the scene focuses on the neon-lit stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: vendor stall service area with food preparation visible

events.description: moves closer to the counter to examine the maneki-neko and food items
circles around to view the side of the counter with the active food grill

agents.ego_description: examining the vendor stall details, moving around the counter to view the food preparation area and decorative items

notable_agents.action: vendor preparing food behind the counter, occasionally looking toward the camera
customer sitting on red stool near the counter, facing the vendor

segments.scene_description: The player moves around the vendor stall, examining the maneki-neko figure and food grill up close. The vendor continues working behind the counter while a customer sits on a nearby stool. The neon frame remains visible to the left as the camera circles to show different angles of the food preparation area.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor continuation past the vendor area

events.description: moves away from the vendor stall and continues down the market corridor

agents.ego_description: walking away from the vendor stall and continuing through the market passage toward the stairs

entered.detail: continuation of the market corridor leading deeper into the structure

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the vendor stall and continues down the market corridor. The neon frame and counter items exit the field of view as the camera approaches the concrete stairs with red neon lighting. The industrial metal beams remain visible overhead as the scene transitions back to the wider market passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow cyberpunk market corridor that focuses intensely on a neon-lit food stall before returning to the industrial passage. It begins by moving under red paper lanterns and digital menu screens, passing industrial metal beams and concrete flooring. As the camera turns, the red lanterns fade from view and the scene shifts toward a vendor stall defined by a glowing yellow and pink neon frame, where a maneki-neko figure and a food grill become the central focus. The camera then circles the counter to examine the food preparation area and the vendor at work before gliding past the stall. Finally, the neon frame exits the field of view as the movement continues down the corridor toward concrete stairs illuminated by red neon lighting.
